raw:
{
  "judge_id": "J123",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 5,
    "R1.7": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The agent identifies a sharp delta with prior work (Park et al., 2023) and maps against it, providing concrete revisions to strengthen the novelty claim.",
    "R1.7": "The agent audits every load-bearing citation, flags missing key works (e.g., potential predecessors not cited), and demonstrates bibliographic precision.",
    "RX.1": "The agent marks confidence in its critique and uncertainty about external factors (e.g., existence of Park et al., 2023), providing a clear rationale for its recommendations.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed active set, addressing each dimension with relevant analysis and recommendations.",
    "RX.4": "The agent identifies potential harmful patterns in the original text (overclaiming novelty) and provides constructive revisions to avoid them.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, demonstrating transparency and accountability."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.95,
    "RX.1": 0.85,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.95
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The agent identifies a sharp delta with prior work (Park et al., 2023) and maps against it, providing concrete revisions to strengthen the novelty claim.
rationale.R1.7: The agent audits every load-bearing citation, flags missing key works (e.g., potential predecessors not cited), and demonstrates bibliographic precision.
rationale.RX.1: The agent marks confidence in its critique and uncertainty about external factors (e.g., existence of Park et al., 2023), providing a clear rationale for its recommendations.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set, addressing each dimension with relevant analysis and recommendations.
rationale.RX.4: The agent identifies potential harmful patterns in the original text (overclaiming novelty) and provides constructive revisions to avoid them.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, demonstrating transparency and accountability.
